app.title: Business Acquisition Analysis
app.subtitle: Professional Valuation & Due Diligence Platform
app.disclaimer: Note: This is not legal or tax advice. All information is for guidance only. Please consult a qualified lawyer or tax advisor for legally binding assessments.

step1.title: Company Identity
step1.description: Basic information about the target company.
step1.beschreibung: Brief description of the business model
step1.beschreibungPlaceholder: What does the company sell? How is revenue generated?
step1.hinweis_gbr: For a GbR, only an Asset Deal is possible — a Share Deal does not exist for this legal form. The GbR itself cannot be transferred.

step2.title: Financial KPIs
step2.description: Financial history is the most important basis for any valuation. Best estimates are acceptable where exact figures are unavailable.
step2.ebitdaHint: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization. If not separately calculated: net profit + depreciation + interest + taxes.
step2.inhabergehaltHint: Required for EBITDA normalization. Only relevant for sole proprietorships and partnerships.
step2.einmaligkostenHint: Costs not part of regular operations (lawsuits, relocations, extraordinary write-downs).
step2.privatnutzungLabel: Business Costs for Private Use of Assets (€/year)
step2.privatnutzungHint: e.g. company vehicle with private use, partial rent
step2.verbindlichkeitenHint: Sum of all debts: bank loans, accounts payable, shareholder loans
step2.normalisierungHint: Normalized EBITDA adjusts for above-market owner salary, one-off costs and private use of assets to represent sustainable earnings potential.
step2.marktgehaltHint: What would it cost to hire a professional manager? Typical range: €50,000–90,000/year

step3.title: Assets & Net Asset Value
step3.description: Capture all tangible and intangible assets. Critical input for the asset-based valuation method.
step3.inventarMhdHint: ⚠️  For fertilizers and agricultural products: Expiry date analysis required! Expired or soon-to-expire goods may be worth €0.
step3.inventarMhd: Share of stock expiring in < 12 months (%)
step3.domainHint: Guideline: keyword domains €500–5,000, branded €100–500, premium domains significantly more.
step3.socialWertHint: Guideline: 1,000 organic followers ≈ €500–1,500. Engagement rate and niche relevance are decisive.
step3.dsgvoHint: ⚠️  GDPR: Customer data can only be transferred with explicit consent or legitimate interest. Individual assessment required!

step4.title: Infrastructure & Contracts
step4.description: Technology stack, contracts and dependencies — essential for assessing transferability.
step4.shopifyTransferHint: Shopify stores can be transferred via 'Transfer Store Ownership'. Monthly costs continue uninterrupted. Shopify Payments: New verification required by buyer!
step4.zahlungsanbieterHint: ⚠️  Payment provider accounts (PayPal, Stripe, Klarna) are NOT transferable — buyer must open new accounts and re-integrate all gateways!
step4.kanalHint: Total should equal 100%. Amazon/eBay seller accounts are NOT transferable — separate accounts needed for buyer!
step4.toolsAbonnementenHint: e.g. Shopify Apps, email marketing, ERP, analytics tools
step4.par613aHinweis: § 613a BGB (German Employment Law): In a business transfer (Betriebsübergang), all employment contracts automatically transfer to the buyer. Termination due to the acquisition is invalid. Employees have a right to object within 1 month of notification. Note: Collective agreements and works agreements continue!

step5.title: Legal & Compliance
step5.description: Legal situation, permits and compliance status of the business.
step5.erlaubnisseHint: Fertilizer trade: Check if DüMV (Fertilizer Ordinance) and Plant Protection Act are relevant. Permits are often person-specific — not automatically transferable!
step5.avvVertraege: Data Processing Agreements (DPA) signed with service providers?
step5.sicherheitsvorfall: Data protection incidents in last 2 years?
step5.gesellschaftsvertragHint: For GbR: Without a written partnership agreement, §§ 705 et seq. BGB apply — unanimous consent required for all decisions. Asset Deal requires agreement of ALL partners!
step5.vinkulierungsklausel: Lock-up clauses or rights of first refusal?
step5.inhaberAbhaengigkeit: Is the business highly dependent on the owner?

inhaberAbhaengigkeitOptions.stark: Highly dependent — customers buy only for the owner
inhaberAbhaengigkeitOptions.mittel: Medium — some client relationships are personal
inhaberAbhaengigkeitOptions.gering: Low — processes documented, team works independently

step6.title: Market & Competition
step6.description: Market position, growth potential and competitive landscape.
step6.naechsteSchritte: Investment required for next growth stage (€)
step6.kundenkonzentrationHint: High customer concentration > 30% with 1 customer = increased risk → valuation discount

step7.title: Transaction & Tax
step7.description: Transaction structure, asking price and tax planning.
step7.dealStrukturGbrHint: For GbR, sole proprietorships and partnerships, only an Asset Deal is possible. A Share Deal requires a corporation (GmbH, AG, UG).
step7.par613aWarning: § 613a BGB — IMPORTANT: In an Asset Deal involving employees, ALL employment contracts automatically transfer to the buyer ('Betriebsübergang'). This is mandatory and cannot be contractually excluded. Employees may object within 1 month of notification — they remain with the seller. Consequences: Buyer is jointly liable for pre-existing obligations (jointly with seller for 1 year), collective agreements continue for 1 year.
step7.kfwHint: KfW ERP Startup Loan – Universal: up to €25M, term 2–20 years. Note: Application through your house bank — not directly from KfW!
step7.steuerHinweis: ⚠️  The following tax calculations are ESTIMATES based on §§ 16, 34 EStG and are for guidance only. Binding tax calculations only by a tax advisor!
step7.buchwertAnteile: Book value of shares / business assets (€)
step7.bisherFreibetragGenutzt: § 16 para. 4 EStG exemption already used previously?

result.title: Valuation Result
result.subtitle: Based on your inputs
result.disclaimer: This valuation is a guideline based on the data entered. It does not replace professional business consulting or legal due diligence. All values are estimates.
result.steuerDisclaimer: ⚠️  Guideline value only — binding tax calculation only by a tax advisor!

warnings.gbr_nur_asset_deal: GbR: Only Asset Deal possible. No Share Deal!
warnings.par613a: § 613a BGB: Business transfer — all employment contracts transfer automatically!
warnings.dsgvo_kundendaten: GDPR: Customer data transfer requires legal review!
warnings.mhd_inventar: Expiry date risk: Expiring inventory significantly reduces value!
warnings.zahlungsanbieter: Payment providers not transferable — new accounts required!
warnings.keine_jahresabschluesse: Missing financial statements significantly reduce valuation accuracy!
warnings.hohe_inhaberabhaengigkeit: High owner dependency: Buyer risk! Earn-out structure recommended.
warnings.keine_marke: No registered trademark: Brand protection missing — competitors may use the name.
warnings.hohe_kundenkonzentration: High customer concentration: Cluster risk — valuation discount needed!
